{{Quote|Looks like their power is tied to their tombs.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Game" />}}
The '''spectral guardians''' were [[Force ghost/Legends|spirits]] that guarded the [[Jedi monument (Rhen Var)|Jedi monument]] on [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]]. During his search for [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] during the [[Dark Reaper crisis]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] [[Battle of Rhen Var (Clone Wars)|encountered]] them protecting Qel-Droma's tomb. Not allowing him to enter, Skywalker was forced to battle them in a [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tank]]. He managed to dissipate them by destroying their tombs, which their powers were tied to. He then proceeded to retrieve the information he sought.<ref name="Game" />

These mysterious creatures could pass through matter and create weapons of energy from the air.<ref name="CSWE" />
